full_text:
Xiang Xu (Fuxing)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiang Xu, styledFuxing, was born in Henei. A hermit and charlatan, suggested that the Turban revolt could be put down by reading to them. He was executed. Xiang Xu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Xiang Xu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
